name: ghq-v2
description: Clean-break redesign of GHQ with beads-centric task tracking, native SKILL.md skills, company symlinks, and loops/ runtime state.

userStories.title: Scaffold directory structure and initialize git repo
userStories.description: As a GHQ operator, I want the ghq_v2 directory tree created with git init so that all subsequent phases have a home.
acceptanceCriteria: ~/repos/ghq_v2/ exists with git initialized

.claude/skills/ contains 20 subdirectories (architect, backend, frontend, database, code-reviewer, qa, full-stack, enhancement, video-gen, prd, run-project, execute-task, learn, search, checkpoint, garden, cleanup, handoff, newcompany, newproject)
.claude/hooks/ directory exists
knowledge/ contains subdirectories: ralph, skills, policies, ghq-core, video-gen
loops/ directory exists
companies/ directory exists
~/Documents/GHQ/companies/ base directory exists
e2eTests: git status in ghq_v2 shows clean init

userStories.title: Write root configuration files
userStories.description: As a GHQ operator, I want CLAUDE.md, settings.json, .gitignore, .claudeignore, README.md, AGENTS.md, and manifest.yaml created so the repo is properly configured.
acceptanceCriteria: .claude/CLAUDE.md references bd, SKILL.md, loops/, company symlinks — not prd.json, skill.yaml, workspace/, commands/
.claude/settings.json has PreToolUse (Glob), PostToolUse (Bash), and PreCompact hooks configured
.gitignore includes companies/ line
.claudeignore has minimal credential patterns (.env, *.pem, *.key)
README.md has setup instructions and philosophy
AGENTS.md has beads integration section (copy from v1)
companies/manifest.yaml has schema header with no company entries
e2eTests: grep 'companies/' .claudeignore returns nothing (companies/ not in claudeignore)

userStories.title: Initialize beads database
userStories.description: As a GHQ operator, I want beads initialized at the ghq_v2 root so all task tracking goes through a single bd instance.
acceptanceCriteria: bd init completes successfully in ~/repos/ghq_v2
.beads/ directory exists with dolt database
bd ready runs without error
.beads/ contents are tracked in git (not gitignored)
e2eTests: cd ~/repos/ghq_v2 && bd ready returns exit code 0

userStories.title: Create hook scripts
userStories.description: As a GHQ operator, I want the 3 hook scripts (block-ghq-glob, auto-checkpoint-trigger, auto-handoff-trigger) created and executable so GHQ protections are active.
acceptanceCriteria: block-ghq-glob.sh blocks Glob from ghq_v2 root, suggests knowledge/, loops/, .claude/skills/ paths
auto-checkpoint-trigger.sh detects git commit and nudges appending JSONL to loops/history.jsonl
auto-handoff-trigger.sh fires on PreCompact and nudges /handoff
All 3 scripts pass bash -n syntax check
All 3 scripts are executable (chmod +x)
userStories.notes: Translate from v1 hooks with v2 path updates

userStories.title: Migrate and rewrite knowledge files
userStories.description: As a GHQ operator, I want the knowledge/ directory populated with Ralph methodology (copied), video-gen docs (copied), and rewritten ghq-core schemas, skill guides, and policies for v2.
acceptanceCriteria: knowledge/ralph/ has all 13 files copied from v1
knowledge/video-gen/ has 3 files copied from v1
knowledge/ghq-core/quick-reference.md rewritten for v2 (SKILL.md, beads, loops/)
knowledge/ghq-core/skill-schema.md documents native SKILL.md format (not skill.yaml)
knowledge/ghq-core/prd-schema.md documents beads-based PRD workflow (not prd.json)
knowledge/ghq-core/loops-schema.md documents state.jsonl and history.jsonl formats
knowledge/ghq-core/index-md-spec.md and project-template.md copied from v1
knowledge/policies/company-isolation.md moved from .claude/policies/ with symlink notes
knowledge/skills/README.md rewritten for SKILL.md authoring
knowledge/INDEX.md updated with v2 entries
e2eTests: grep 'prd.json' knowledge/ghq-core/prd-schema.md returns nothing (no v1 references)
userStories.notes: Copy ralph/ and video-gen/ as-is. Rewrite ghq-core/ schemas, skills/README.md, and add policies/

userStories.title: Translate 9 execution and composition skills to SKILL.md
userStories.description: As a GHQ operator, I want the 9 existing skills (architect, backend, frontend, database, code-reviewer, qa, video-gen, full-stack, enhancement) translated from skill.yaml to native SKILL.md format.
acceptanceCriteria: Each skill has .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md with frontmatter description
Instructions content preserved from skill.yaml
Composition skills (full-stack, enhancement) have Execution Order section replacing depends_on YAML
No skill.yaml or registry.yaml files exist anywhere
No .claude/commands/ directory exists
e2eTests: Each SKILL.md starts with --- frontmatter containing description:
userStories.notes: Read each v1 skill.yaml, extract instructions block, wrap in SKILL.md format

userStories.title: Translate 10 commands to SKILL.md with beads integration
userStories.description: As a GHQ operator, I want the 10 existing commands (prd, run-project, execute-task, learn, search, checkpoint, garden, cleanup, handoff, newcompany) translated to SKILL.md format with beads and loops/ integration.
acceptanceCriteria: prd/SKILL.md creates beads epics+tasks via bd create instead of prd.json
run-project/SKILL.md uses bd ready, bd update --claim, bd close instead of prd.json parsing
execute-task/SKILL.md reads tasks from bd show instead of prd.json, resolves chains from SKILL.md body
learn/SKILL.md targets SKILL.md files (not skill.yaml), logs to loops/history.jsonl
search/SKILL.md has updated directory references
checkpoint/SKILL.md appends to loops/state.jsonl
garden/SKILL.md checks SKILL.md existence (no registry)
cleanup/SKILL.md verifies SKILL.md files, updates INDEX.md locations for v2
handoff/SKILL.md reads from loops/, writes to loops/history.jsonl
newcompany/SKILL.md creates ~/Documents/GHQ/companies/<slug>/, symlink, and beads parent epic
userStories.notes: prd, run-project, execute-task, and newcompany need major rewrites. Others need moderate updates.

userStories.title: Create newproject skill
userStories.description: As a GHQ operator, I want a /newproject skill that scaffolds a project inside a company with directory structure and a child beads epic.
acceptanceCriteria: .claude/skills/newproject/SKILL.md exists with frontmatter
Skill creates project dirs: knowledge/, workspace/, assets/, repos/, tools/
Skill creates child beads epic under company's parent epic
Skill validates company exists in manifest.yaml before proceeding
Skill validates project doesn't already exist

userStories.title: Create loops/ runtime state structure
userStories.description: As a GHQ operator, I want loops/ initialized with empty JSONL files and schema documentation so runtime state has a home.
acceptanceCriteria: loops/state.jsonl exists (empty)
loops/history.jsonl exists (empty)
loops/README.md documents both JSONL schemas with field tables and event types

userStories.title: Final validation and initial commit
userStories.description: As a GHQ operator, I want the complete ghq_v2 scaffold validated (no v1 artifacts, all files present) and committed as the initial git commit.
acceptanceCriteria: 20 SKILL.md files exist in .claude/skills/
No skill.yaml, registry.yaml, or .claude/commands/ exists
No workspace/ or projects/ directories exist (v1 artifacts)
3 hook scripts exist and are executable
.beads/ initialized and bd ready works
companies/manifest.yaml exists
loops/ has state.jsonl, history.jsonl, README.md
Initial git commit created with all files
userStories.notes: This is the final gating story — runs after everything else.

metadata.goal: Create ghq_v2 from scratch: beads-centric task tracking, native SKILL.md skills, company symlinks to ~/Documents/GHQ/, loops/ runtime state
metadata.successCriteria: All 20 skills translated and present as SKILL.md, beads initialized, hooks working, knowledge migrated, no v1 artifacts remaining
qualityGates: Structure validation: file counts, no v1 artifacts, hooks executable, bd ready works
